_meta.note: Single source of truth. All pages are virtual rewrites unless type=archive or type=single. All REST routes under namespace apollo/v1.

pages.title: Home / Mural router
pages.note: Routes to explore.php or home template

rest_routes.description: Create account (social_name, instagram, email, password, sounds, quiz)

templates.description: Login form — 7G Firewall protected, custom /acesso URL
7-step multi-step register (social_name → instagram → email → password → confirm → sounds → quiz)

apollo-login.note_path: Main plugin class at non-standard path: src/Core/Plugin.php (not src/Plugin.php)

pages.title: Radar
pages.description: Discover all users — each user is a new spot to track

pages.title: Conquistas
pages.description: Achievement gallery with AJAX, filter, grid/list, Load More

rest_routes.description: Events grouped by day for calendar view
Event stats: views, fav, wow, RSVP counts

templates.description: Classified creation form — PENDING template creation

apollo-classifieds.note: Frontend complement to apollo-adverts. Handles marketplace template and user-facing features.

ajax_handlers.description: Initialize chat after safety disclaimer acceptance

apollo-social.note: FORBIDDEN: like, heart, reaction → use 'wow'. No image uploads allowed in POST /feed/post.

pages.title: Mural (redirect)
pages.note: ^mural/?$ → 301 redirect to /explore — NOT a separate page

pages.title: Feed (redirect)
pages.note: ^feed/?$ → 301 redirect to /explore — NOT a separate page

rest_routes.description: Delete / Edit own activity post (within 15 min)
All pending group invitations for current user

shortcodes.description: Wow reaction button for a post
Wow chart showing reaction distribution. NOT in apollo-registry.json — DIVERGENCE.

rest_routes.description: Get VAPID public key for PushManager.subscribe()

templates.description: Notifications page with severity colors, snooze, filters, polling (60s)

rest_routes.description: List user's threads / Create new thread
Get older messages / Send new message
Get all pinned messages in thread
Find or create thread by context

templates.description: Full chat UI — inbox + thread view combined via JS routing

pages.title: Assinar Documento
pages.description: ICP-Brasil digital signing with PDF.js viewer

rest_routes.description: Sign with PFX certificate (accepts placement coords)

templates.description: PDF viewer with interactive signature placement
Admin panel — signatures list and management

js_files.description: State-machine PDF viewer + interactive placement (PDF.js + interact.js)
Hand-drawn signature pad (canvas draw, upload, undo, clear, color, PNG export)

pages.title: Gestor Apollo
pages.description: Event production management — tasks, team, budget, suppliers, timeline, kanban

apollo-journal.note: Magazine & editorial platform — NREP auto-coding, custom taxonomies (music/culture/rio/formato), shortcodes, REST API, magazine layouts.

templates.description: Magazine-style archive for categories and custom taxonomies

template_parts.description: Embeddable 3-column news grid widget for mural page

shortcodes.description: News grid widget (count, category, columns, loadmore)
Single article card embed by ID or category

apollo-shortcodes.note: Registers ALL shortcodes from all Apollo plugins. Also handles global search + newsletter + cult calendar.

rest_routes.description: Global search across all content types

apollo-templates.note: Composite module: Canvas templates, Auth flow pieces, Home parts, Mural parts, Navbar, Weather, FrontendEditor, FrontendRouter

templates.description: Sobre — About Apollo page. Canvas mode, uses navbar.v1.php

apollo-dashboard.note: Single dashboard.php with JS-routed panels. Sub-pages are virtual panel switches, not separate templates.

templates.description: Main dashboard — single SPA shell with JS panel routing

apollo-hub.note: HUB is public Linktree-style page (/hub/). PROFILE is full page (/id/).

apollo-admin.note: MANDATORY unified admin panel — one tab per plugin, grouped by layer. Option key: apollo_admin_settings

templates.description: Main Apollo CPanel — tabbed settings UI

rest_routes.description: Report content (user-facing). NOT in apollo-registry.json — DIVERGENCE.

ajax_handlers.description: Legacy AJAX fallback for report content

apollo-coauthor.note: 10 Component classes: BulkEdit, CoauthorIterator, ContentFilter, GuestAuthors, MetaBox, NotifyCoauthors, QueryIntegration, Shortcodes, Taxonomy, UserPostCount

rest_routes.description: Search users to add as coauthors

apollo-statistics.note: NO src/Plugin.php — REST registered via includes/class-rest-controller.php

rest_routes.description: SEO data for a post (title, description, canonical, og, schema, robots)
SEO data for a taxonomy term

apollo-sheets.note: Data stored as JSON in post_content. Accessed via shortcode, REST, or Admin UI only.

apollo-runtime.note: NEVER register meta keys, CPTs, or taxonomies here. Runtime bootstrap only.

divergences_from_registry: apollo-social: /mural and /feed are 301 REDIRECTS to /explore, not separate pages
apollo-mod: extra route /mod/report (POST, auth=true) — NOT in apollo-registry.json
apollo-wow: shortcode apollo_wow_chart NOT in registry
apollo-email: shortcode apollo_email_prefs NOT in registry
apollo-statistics: 3 extra routes (/stats/health, /stats/trend, /stats/chart) vs 5 in registry
apollo-coauthor: extra route /coauthors/search NOT in registry
apollo-sign: 2 extra templates (signature-pad.php, admin-signatures.php) not in registry
apollo-login: main plugin class at src/Core/Plugin.php (non-standard), not src/Plugin.php
apollo-groups: 30 template parts (11 directory + 19 single) — registry shows none
apollo-templates: massive extra structure (auth, home, mural parts, navbar, weather helpers)
apollo-admin: 40 section template partials — registry listed none
apollo-dashboard: sub-pages are JS panel switches, not separate template files
apollo-fav: REST at includes/class-rest-controller.php, no src/Plugin.php
apollo-statistics: REST at includes/class-rest-controller.php, no src/Plugin.php
